question: Chapters
feedback: The text clearly states that the thesis is divided into two main parts—theoretical and practical—and further breaks down the theoretical part into three sub‑sections. This satisfies the requirement of listing the main sections.

question: Description
feedback: While the theoretical part is briefly described (general evacuation principle, Xiaomi arena plans, and other related studies), the practical part receives no description at all. Therefore the text does not fully meet the criterion of describing the contents of each section.

question: Structure
feedback: The overall skeleton—two main parts with a three‑subsection theoretical part—is presented, but because the practical part is not elaborated, the reader cannot easily grasp the complete structure of the thesis. Adding a short description of the practical section would make the structure clearer.
